name: HRA_EVAL_ROLE_ACTIONS
description: This table stores the roles and the actions each role can perform on a performance document.

columns.Name: EVAL_ROLE_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Primark key of the Evaluation Role Actions.

columns.Name: ITEM_RATINGS_REQUIRED_CODE
columns.Comments: ITEM_RATINGS_REQUIRED_CODE

columns.Name: ITEM_COMMENTS_REQUIRED_CODE
columns.Comments: ITEM_COMMENTS_REQUIRED_CODE

columns.Name: SECTION_RATINGS_REQUIRED_CODE
columns.Comments: SECTION_RATINGS_REQUIRED_CODE

columns.Name: SECTION_COMMENTS_REQUIRED_CODE
columns.Comments: SECTION_COMMENTS_REQUIRED_CODE

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: EVALUATION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of Evaluation.

columns.Name: EVAL_ROLE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRA_EVAL_ROLES

columns.Name: EVAL_SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: The identifier for the section (not shown in the UI)

columns.Name: SHARE_RATINGS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates the system will display the ratings of the specified role to the worker in the final performance document.

columns.Name: SHARE_COMMENTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates the system will display the comments of the specified role to the worker in the final performance document.

columns.Name: UPDATE_PROFILE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates the system will publish content items from the performance document, to the person profile, when the document status changes to Completed.

columns.Name: PERSON_PROFILE_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of person profile in Profile Management

columns.Name: QUALIFIER_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the qualifier ID for the person profile in Profile Management

columns.Name: VIEW_PCPN_QSTNR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the participant questionnaire can be viewed by the role

columns.Name: VIEW_PCPN_NAME_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the participant name can be viewed by the role

columns.Name: VIEW_PCPN_ROLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the participant role name can be seen or not by the selected role.

columns.Name: PCPN_ENTER_WRK_CMTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the participant role can enter the comments for the worker.

columns.Name: VIEW_MGR_QSTNR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the particular role can see the manager questionnaire

columns.Name: VIEW_WRK_QSTNR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the particular role can see the worker questionnaire

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CHILD_ITEM_COMMENTS_REQ_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to show competency type comments to specified role or not.

columns.Name: PROVIDE_ITEM_RATINGS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether item ratings can be provided by the role.

columns.Name: PROVIDE_ITEM_COMMENTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether item comments can be provided by the role.

columns.Name: PROVIDE_SECTION_RATINGS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether section ratings can be provided by the role.

columns.Name: PROVIDE_SECTION_COMMENTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether section comments can be provided by the role.

columns.Name: VIEW_WKR_QSTNR_SCORES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Store whether the role can view worker's questionnaire score.

columns.Name: VIEW_MGR_QSTNR_SCORES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Store whether the role can view manager's questionnaire score.

columns.Name: VIEW_PCPN_QSTNR_SCORES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Store whether the role can view participant's questionnaire score.

columns.Name: VIEW_OWN_QSTNR_SCORES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Store whether the role can view its own questionnaire score.
